name: Framework gap closure
description: Address the six framework gaps (FGAP-001 through FGAP-006) so the hand-enacted L1–L5 structure becomes natively expressible. Each gap becomes a feature of its own with stories and tasks. Order is informed by priority (P1 first) and by what the remaining phases need.
exit_criteria: FGAP-001 through FGAP-006 all in closed or wontfix state
pi-project natively supports nested blocks, scoped findings, materialized views, authorship attestation, state-machine validation, and schema versioning
produces: framework substrate for the layered model
